hooks.command: echo '[HOOK] Bash command about to run. If this is git reset --hard, git push --force, or rm -rf — stop and confirm with the user first.'

cd /home/user/erg-dashboard && FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(js|jsx)$' | head -5); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then npx eslint --max-warnings=0 $FILES 2>&1 | tail -10 || true; fi

cd /home/user/erg-dashboard && CHANGES=$(git status --short 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$CHANGES" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[HOOK] $CHANGES file(s) changed and uncommitted. Run: git add -p && git commit when ready."; fi
